stemHtml: Select the option that lists only those items in a message sent by ATC to an aircraft that are required to be read back.

options.a: Descend to 3000 ft, wind 240°, 15 kt, gusts 30 kt, turn right heading 210°, reduce speed to 160 kt, squawk 1723 and braking action poor.
options.b: Descend to 3000 ft, turn right heading 210°, reduce speed to 160 kt and squawk 1723.
options.c: Descend to 3000 ft, turn right heading 210°, reduce speed to 160 kt, squawk 1723 and braking action poor.
options.d: Descend to 3000 ft, wind 240°, 15 kt, gusts 30 kt, turn right heading 210° and squawk 1723.
